{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":2326},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540890440373338904","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"吊的没话说了，我同时看的其他两本已经掉到8分左右了，这本无论是感情和节奏都处理的比较好，军旅剧情也蛮燃的，看的我都想去当兵了[捂脸]，有些地方也挺能让读者感受到情绪的感染，仿佛是跟主角一样感同身受，这本书的感情线也写的挺好，目前看我感觉作者是不会写女主吧[求爆更][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755753583,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/MB71UeN+JECiApCvdjQec=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"776707306434920","user_name":"黄金宫的苏宝国"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"776707306434920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info":{"abstract":"“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，最年轻的将军，能分享一下您的成功秘诀吗？”

　　“不谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说不为爱情牵挂，不被情感左右，一心建功立业报效祖国，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　第二天，秦风看着报纸，一口老血差点喷出来。

　　“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，您能分享一下成功秘诀吗？”

　　“多谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说，是爱情激励你奋力前行，披荆斩棘，帮助你克服重重难关，一路踏上巅峰的。您觉得，情侣之间相互扶持更容易获得成功，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　因为这段采访，年轻人踊跃报名参军，国内结婚率和生育率呈现井喷式增长，其中军婚比重占大多数.....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/41b89d866a308f8c9b7ef6cbe312ac27","author":"椒盐榔头","author_id":"","book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_name":"人在军校，还没毕业就被全军疯抢","book_short_name":"尖兵荣耀","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7380223388825944638","read_count":"97914","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3449656"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1436","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,系统,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/200a4b642546845caa986684537c8d4c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173817&x-signature=Blq6RMvJKaNb%2FCuGC%2Fe3Pp6Yx24%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2982289230280755","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"213"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":113430,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":15647},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7533943681407828761","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前我已经读了180个小时。这本书我反复的阅读，反复的看，作者每天只更两章，我实在等不及就会再品读一遍。这本书对我来说是细糠，不仅体现在文笔，更体现在他对人物的刻画描写中。即使只有在第1章做自我介绍的一个新兵蛋子，说他会rap，但在过了那么多章以后，作者仍没有忘记也给他记住了，名字写了他有投掷手雷的天赋。这是很多作者都没有的，我十分喜欢这位作者。他的剧情也感觉十分的饱满，优秀。我给他的评价是上乘中的上乘，细糠中的细糠，我最喜欢的书没有之一。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754138434,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没什么好说的，就留个句号吧。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7XQkM8qMlnbndAiOFjTxf8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ea2704a739ac4790aee04aac952f85ca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535654&x-signature=PKg7LmlvGYwsjJtt4Hwym9k%2BWzA%3D","user_id":"734898578003485","user_name":"苏享福"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"734898578003485","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info":{"abstract":"“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，最年轻的将军，能分享一下您的成功秘诀吗？”

　　“不谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说不为爱情牵挂，不被情感左右，一心建功立业报效祖国，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　第二天，秦风看着报纸，一口老血差点喷出来。

　　“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，您能分享一下成功秘诀吗？”

　　“多谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说，是爱情激励你奋力前行，披荆斩棘，帮助你克服重重难关，一路踏上巅峰的。您觉得，情侣之间相互扶持更容易获得成功，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　因为这段采访，年轻人踊跃报名参军，国内结婚率和生育率呈现井喷式增长，其中军婚比重占大多数.....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/41b89d866a308f8c9b7ef6cbe312ac27","author":"椒盐榔头","author_id":"","book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_name":"人在军校，还没毕业就被全军疯抢","book_short_name":"尖兵荣耀","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7380223388825944638","read_count":"97914","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3449656"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1436","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,系统,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/200a4b642546845caa986684537c8d4c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173817&x-signature=Blq6RMvJKaNb%2FCuGC%2Fe3Pp6Yx24%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2982289230280755","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读180小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":33,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":605324,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":649164,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":27316},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7446827792965042968","common":{"comment_type":99,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看～～～希望无女主…期待无……女主……
（一切以秦队的意愿为先…）
但还是希望无女主[哭]
因为真的真的真的真的太好看了，看到505无跳章…故事很精彩[爱慕]
从救火，到救灾，从审问毒贩，到一等功臣，人民英雄，只身陷入危险，为一方争取十几年的安定……
农场非人的训练…让秦队变的更强，更坚定！
军校的学习…利剑的实习（未完待续）
更期待后面的剧情了，嘻嘻😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬
作者大大加油[赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733861856,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"完结","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1+UPw51rjo14xAbTdEo4DQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/535bb07369da4287bd246750b1b11950~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528310&x-signature=aUkQEfMHMaVHVcgsgRrT1VrZDHc%3D","user_id":"229134914817076","user_name":"板砖1号"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"229134914817076","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776436258,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info":{"abstr 　　“没错！”

　　第二天，秦风看着报纸，一口老血差点喷出来。

　　“多谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说，是爱情激励你奋力前行，披荆斩棘，帮助你克服重重难关，一路踏上巅峰的。您觉得，情侣之间相互扶持更容易获得成功，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　因为这段采访，年轻人踊跃报名参军，国内结婚率和生育率呈现井喷式增长，其中军婚比重占大多数.....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/41b89d866a308f8c9b7ef6cbe312ac27","author":"椒盐榔头","author_id":"","book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_name":"人在军校，还没毕业就被全军疯抢","book_short_name":"尖兵荣耀","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7380223388825944638","read_count":"97914","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3449656"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1436","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,系统,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/200a4b642546845caa986684537c8d4c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173817&x-signature=Blq6RMvJKaNb%2FCuGC%2Fe3Pp6Yx24%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2982289230280755","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"712"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":58,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":123073,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":157015,"reply_count":12,"show_pv":76146},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1733897912,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7400558398053892926","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者要不然你把性别改一改吧？给自己涂一层保护色，不然老是遭人欺负，我们看着也心疼。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723080136,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53429296818"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"176"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读198小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":415,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":713034,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7398179465786622782","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书超好看，觉得作者写的不错，特别是人物描写。不知道为什么看别的军旅题材的小说，别人看的人数嘎嘎多。到我们这边人却好少。不过没关系，作者大大加油。[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722524939,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"梦醒回神挽流光，历历过往，成苍，神伤。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyTLv3N9R2MiIWHlVsPCUCM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ce00d77fa38c4c9b84f11ab30a2a8432~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530637&x-signature=BAK%2BvhOfGi59nHCTKgarh273GbU%3D","user_id":"53429296818","user_name":"䄂染尘香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53429296818","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info":{"abstract":"“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，最年轻的将军，能分享一下您的成功秘诀吗？”

　　“不谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说不为爱情牵挂，不被情感左右，一心建功立业报效祖国，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　第二天，秦风看着报纸，一口老血差点喷出来。

　　“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，您能分享一下成功秘诀吗？”

　　“多谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说，是爱情激励你奋力前行，披荆斩棘，帮助你克服重重难关，一路踏上巅峰的。您觉得，情侣之间相互扶持更容易获得成功，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

e}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7384464528932995864","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者你这本书写的真好,我看过很多同样题材的军旅小说，但是唯独你这本会，会让我回忆起在部队的时候，我想你也是当过兵的才能写的这么细节和真切，这本书我会继续观看下去，也希望你能继续保持写好这么精彩的小说[顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719331144,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5QozDXEQyNkP8NRKNez6vU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531405&x-signature=CBwRrprj%2BL33fT06lI8aSpnKuhg%3D","user_id":"110857782081","user_name":"炸天帮单手压ak"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110857782081","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":0,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info":{"abstract":"“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，最年轻的将军，能分享一下您的成功秘诀吗？”

　　“不谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说不为爱情牵挂，不被情感左右，一心建功立业报效祖国，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

　　第二天，秦风看着报纸，一口老血差点喷出来。

　　“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，您能分享一下成功秘诀吗？”

　　“多谈恋爱。”

　　“您是说，是爱情激励你奋力前行，披荆斩棘，帮助你克服重重难关，一路踏上巅峰的。您觉得，情侣之间相互扶持更容易获得成功，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”

false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615312469482914622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，部队的生活和状态对我这个没当过兵的人来说挺真实的，而且评论区有好多退伍兵，说明作者写的挺写实的，不像有的书漏洞很多，主角的人格魅力很大，是个真正的军人和英雄，人民子弟兵在他身上真的体现出来了，好多次看的我眼泪花忍不住，其他配角也各有各的闪光点，看到三百二十多章了，葛志勇，教导员，赵鹏飞，武进，李家胜，祁猛等等，这些人的形象都能在我的脑海里浮现出来，都是真实鲜活的人，有优点也有缺点，群像文就应该这样，每个人都要有自己的特点，能让人记住，是本好书[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773086064,"group_id":"7380223334908185662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"开心哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N17TD5LyCQI9dvAoCC2zpMY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/debbc50406c94ae28631010003b8f954~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535550&x-signature=aKBWtBMj6Io1SgMWG4Bu5E7Ztts%3D","user_id":"110661302119","user_name":"汀兰郁青"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110661302119","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741794212,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380223334908185662","book_info":{"abstract":"“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，最年轻的将军，能分享一下您的成功秘诀吗？”

　　“作为特等功臣，传奇兵王，您能分享一下成功秘诀吗？”

　　“您是说，是爱情激励你奋力前行，披荆斩棘，帮助你克服重重难关，一路踏上巅峰的。您觉得，情侣之间相互扶持更容易获得成功，是这个意思吗？”

　　“没错！”
